reviews.review_description:
I thought I learnt my lesson by running through the window playing FNAF…. First chump scare with that chucky ghost made me leave a game faster than have ever. 

From now on I only play pg games 😭
I was looking for a game like this, so I bought it and enjoyed it. The difficulty of the puzzles is reasonable and the immersion is very good.
The graphics are great, but add free locomotion and a hints option.

This might be the most well made co-op VR escape room games I've played so far and at $2, it's a steal (despite it being a little short in it's current state). Puzzles and game play are great. I'm really excited for them to release additional rooms.

Highly recommended

developer_response.body: Thank you for your interest!  Please look forward to the next series:)

reviews.review_title: pretty scary but a good puzzler
reviews.review_description: The time mechanic was enough to give an incentive to quickly solve the room. Wondering when we'll get more levels?

This is a great start to a game. It had a few good scares, the ambience is perfect. The hand interactions  leave a bit to be desired and the voice in multiplayer cannot be heard. I played it twice in a row with the same group of people because we liked it so much. Cannot wait for more levels to play.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your interest:) Improve the inconvenience and meet the official release! ! Please look forward to the next series

reviews.review_description: It's pretty short, but the escape room is filled with fun puzzles. I love that you can do it in multiplayer mode as it's really fun to go through it in a team. Can't wait to see more rooms!

reviews.review_title: Where can I buy other scene?
reviews.review_description: I want another mission, where can I buy it?

developer_response.body: Thank you for your interest!  we are developing several stories. Please look forward to the next series:)
Thank you for your interest:) Please look forward to the next series!

reviews.review_description: So far I like it a lot, one room for the low price is great. But I'm either making a mistake or there's a glitch? The piece of paper for the blue key says SIDE + 1010 so I added 3071+1010=4081 and nothing happens. I tried reversing it, tried 3071, ect.. Am I missing something?

developer_response.body:
Hello, I'm the support manager of Skonec Entertainment.
Thank you for using our game.
We checked all the inconveniences you shared.
Try to solve the puzzle in a different way than you think.
For example, add numbers as they appear, not in 'SIDE' word order.
I hope you enjoy the game.

reviews.review_description:
I think this is second only to TheRoomVR!
This game is just GREAT: very good job from the developers!
We need more games like this: great puzzles, great atmosphere (maybe a little to scary for old people like me!), great graphic!
I felt I was really in that room!

WE WANT MORE ROOMS!!!!! PLEASE!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your interest:) We are developing a room escape with various stories! Please look forward to the next series

reviews.review_description: I like this game, but it's was easy for me, l complete for 12 minutes))) need more levels!)

Best $1.99 I’ve ever spent! We experienced no glitching or issues with playing multiplayer. We have a few hilarious and intense jump scares! We completed the room with only a few minutes to spare! Can’t wait for additional rooms!! Amazing graphics and overall quality! Great work guys!
It’s really fun but when I try to play with one of my friends it always says room code not found

Great graphics and worth the price. It did freeze on me one time and I couldn't rejoin the room after I quit and restarted but other than that it's pretty fun. I will update once I finish.

Update: I finished with a friend. Some of the clues were pretty easy and some were not. I can't wait for more rooms to come out. Please make more!

THIS PRICE? CRAZY
GRAPHICS? LOOK AT IT FOR YOURSELF.

This game is very good and detailed, my only hitch about it is that the room code does not work and it's hard to play with other people, keeps showing an error when entering the correct code and even multiple times it dosen't work. Please get this fixed so I can play online, thank you.
I played with my daughter. We had fun. We didn't quite beat it yet but as this game develops this game is top tier of it's genre

developer_response.body: Thank you for your interest:) Please look forward to the next series!

reviews.review_description: Can’t wait for the next episodes!

developer_response.body: Thank You for Your Interest :) Will be soon!

reviews.review_description:
it has very good graphics and puzzles. 
I hope the next series comes out SOOOOOOOON!
